# Vibe Browser - AI Web Agent & Agentic Operations

> Vibe Browser is an AI-powered browser co-pilot that lets users control any website with natural language. It also offers Agentic Team, a multi-agent AI system for autonomous SaaS operations.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.vibebrowser.app/): Vibe Browser product page. AI web agent that automates browser tasks using natural language.
- [Teams](https://www.vibebrowser.app/teams): Vibe Browser for Teams. Shared AI automation with workflow sharing, admin controls, and unified billing.
- [People](https://www.vibebrowser.app/people): Personal AI assistant for everyday tasks. Email management, scheduling, bill tracking, job applications.
- [Enterprise](https://www.vibebrowser.app/enterprise): Enterprise-grade AI browser with TEE-based security, SOC 2 compliance, and self-hosted deployment.
- [Lawyers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/lawyers): AI for legal professionals. TEE-protected legal research, case management automation.
- [Recruiters](https://www.vibebrowser.app/recruiters): AI for recruiting. LinkedIn automation, skills-based sourcing, CRM integration.
- [Sales](https://www.vibebrowser.app/sales): AI for sales teams. Gmail integration, CRM automation, outreach automation.
- [Researchers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/researchers): AI for academic and market research. Database search, paper analysis, citation management.
- [Developers](https://www.vibebrowser.app/developers): Browser automation with MCP. Connect to Claude, Cursor, or any AI coding agent.
- [Investors](https://www.vibebrowser.app/investors): AI for investors. Stock research, Morningstar reports, portfolio analysis.
- [Crypto & DeFi](https://www.vibebrowser.app/crypto): AI for crypto. DeFi research, APY comparison, portfolio rebalancing.
- [Tax](https://www.vibebrowser.app/tax): AI tax preparation. Automated form downloads, tax estimation, return filing assistance.
- [MCP](https://www.vibebrowser.app/mcp): Vibe Browser for Agents. Connect real browser sessions to MCP-compatible AI agents.
- [OpenClaw](https://www.vibebrowser.app/openclaw): Vibe Browser for OpenClaw. Command-oriented browser CLI and relay workflow for OpenClaw-style agent control.
- [AI Employee](https://www.vibebrowser.app/aiemployee): Hire an AI employee with real role, browser access, and measurable productivity. The umbrella category for AI employee concepts.
- [Digital Employee](https://www.vibebrowser.app/digitalemployee): Digital workforce with identity, ownership, and measurable productivity. Focus on "autonomous teammate" and "digital workforce" language.
- [AI Outbound](https://www.vibebrowser.app/aioutbound): AI-powered outbound sales teammate that researches prospects, drafts personalized outreach, follows up, and hands qualified leads to humans.
- [Showcase](https://www.vibebrowser.app/showcase): AI workflow examples and browser automation examples across agentic team operations, recruiting, research, sales, finance, and browser-native ops.
- [Compare](https://www.vibebrowser.app/compare): Feature comparison between Vibe Browser and alternatives.
- [About Us](https://www.vibebrowser.app/aboutus): Meet the Vibe Technologies team.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.vibebrowser.app/privacy): Vibe Browser privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.vibebrowser.app/terms): Vibe Browser terms of service.
